BOUCloud

BOU Engineering Solution

BOUCloud

Scalable, secure, and robust cloud infrastructure designed specifically for the high-demand needs of modern African enterprises. We bridge the gap between legacy systems and the future of distributed computing.

  • 99.9% Uptime SLA
  • Local Data Sovereignty
  • Military-Grade Encryption

Cloud Capabilities

Harness the power of infrastructure as code and automated scaling.

Compute Engine

High-performance virtual machines with dedicated resources for your most demanding applications.

Managed DB

Fully managed, high-availability database clusters with automated backups and recovery.

WAF & CDN

Integrated Web Application Firewall and global content delivery for speed and security.

Cloud Migration Journey

Transitioning your business to the cloud doesn't have to be complex.

01

Audit

Comprehensive review of your current on-premise or cloud resources.

02

Architect

Designing a custom cloud topology optimized for cost and performance.

03

Migrate

Zero-downtime migration of your data and applications by our experts.

04

Optimize

Ongoing monitoring and resource tuning to ensure maximum ROI.

BOU HOLDINGS LTD

We specialize in building custom software and hardware to deliver value to your business in unparalleled ways. We enjoy making the lives of our clients easier using software to increase productivity and profit. Saving time and cutting costs gives us joy
